title: Create: Droid Diamond
description: Renewable source of Diamonds with Create Mod!
body:
Introducing Create: Droid Diamond

This is a Minecraft mod addon for the Create Mod. This mod allows you to have a renewable source of diamonds, using create mod components. This means you can now fully automate the creation of diamonds, making a diamond farm, which can be used for other recipes/mods.

This mod creates a long chain of recipe for the creation of Diamonds, it will require multiple other farms to sustain its production, just to balance out the game. You can view them using JEI. Screenshots of recipes can be seen in the gallery.

The Create mod is required when playing.

Mod Showcase:
<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/VxA1fLGVLwM" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>
.

If you have any problems or found bugs in the mod, report it to the discord server by the invite link, or report it in GitHub (Under "external resource").

Want renewable netherrack with create? [https://modrinth.com/mod/create-droid-netherrack](https://modrinth.com/mod/create-droid-netherrack)

Want to download from Curseforge? [https://legacy.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/create-droid-diamond](https://legacy.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/create-droid-diamond)
